amendment.description: An amendment numbered 49 printed in Part B of House Report 119-648 to prohibit funds from being used to close the Port Charlotte VA Clinic in Port Charlotte, FL.

vote.text: On agreeing to the Steube amendment (A005) Agreed to by voice vote.

action.text: House amendment agreed to: On agreeing to the Steube amendment (A005) Agreed to by voice vote.
